purpose: stabilize motorcycle animation frames so corrected and defective alpha/rim states do not alternate during playback
method: uses the corrected first frame of each motorcycle row as the canonical frame and copies it over columns 1 and 2 for rows 8 and 9; this removes flicker from inconsistent transparent wheel/body pixels inside the same motorcycle animation
notes: This intentionally trades subtle wheel-frame cycling on the motorcycles for visual consistency.
Car and van rows remain from v15; only rows 8 and 9 were normalized.
